results.trackName: FOX One: Live News, Sports, TV
results.releaseNotes: We've been busy making your discovery and watch experience even smoother. This release brings app performance, reliability improvements and some bug fixes.
results.description:
Introducing FOX One: the brand-new streaming app for everything FOX. Whether it’s NFL showdowns, MLB thrills, your favorite FOX series, or breaking news from fearless voices, FOX One brings it all—live, loud, and unfiltered. Looking for an app that keeps you hooked? You’re in the right spot. Download FOX One and dive in.

+ LIVE AND UNFILTERED. FOX One has a robust collection of live sports, news, and entertainment for your viewing pleasure. Catch scores as they happen with fast streams in real time. Stay current with breaking news as it unfolds. From our hottest FOX series to iconic live events—you won’t miss a beat. We live for LIVE.

+ FOX NEWS - NOW AVAILABLE on FOX One: stream FOX News live 24/7 anytime, anywhere. Get around-the-clock access to live coverage, breaking news, and your favorite FOX News shows — all in one seamless experience, with alerts to keep you informed.

+ YOUR FOX, YOUR WAY. Skip the search and cut down on aimless scrolling with personalized content from FOX One. Discover relevant live and on-demand shows right on your home screen.

+ RECORD YOUR FAVORITES. Watch live or save it for later. You can record your favorite leagues, teams, and shows with no storage limits. Find all your recordings in your personal library to enjoy on your schedule.

+ CATCH UP WITH HIGHLIGHTS. Joined the game late? No problem—catch up with the highlights you missed, then join live instantly. Bypass the spoilers and hide the live score until you’re all caught up. The biggest moments in sports, served just how you like them.*

+ SWIPE-WORTHY SHORTS. Discover the top trending sports stories, informative news, and TV clips filled with jaw-dropping hot takes—personalized just for you. Get all the entertainment you crave in bite-sized pieces of content.

 *Available for select programming.

FANDOM KNOWS NO BOUNDS 
FOX Sports
Experience ultra-fast streams as you catch the game on the go or on the big screen. Our FOX Sports live coverage gives you access to the action from some of the hottest leagues. Turn up your football fandom with NFL and CFB. Kick back, or fulfill your need for speed with NASCAR and INDYCAR. Watch live games and get in-depth analysis on the sports you love. 

- NFL on FOX
- America’s Game of the Week
- FOX NFL Sunday
- FOX College Football
- MLB on FOX
- Baseball Night in America
- Big Noon Kickoff

FOX News
Don’t miss an update with 24/7 access to the latest headlines and expert analysis on today’s stories. Watch live or on-demand with news to keep you in the loop. FOX One is your source for breaking news and the topics that interest you the most. 

- FOX & Friends
- The Five
- Hannity
- Gutfeld!
- Outnumbered
- Jesse Watters Primetime
- Special Report with Bret Baier
- The Ingraham Angle

FOX Entertainment
Your favorite FOX shows are also on FOX One. There’s something for everyone whether you’re a superfan of classics like The Simpsons and Family Guy, or you like to spice it up with Gordon Ramsay’s Secret Service. You can also stream movies, comedy shows, reality TV and more on-demand. 

- Animal Control
- The 1% Club
- Gordon Ramsay’s Secret Service
- Extracted
- Doc
- Krapopolis
- Universal Basic Guys 
- Celebrity Weakest Link

Terms of Use: https://www.fox.com/terms-of-use
Privacy Policy: https://www.fox.com/privacy-policy
For more information, visit us online at foxone.com
